---
title: "Skills"
format: html
---

```{=html}
<div class="skills-section">

  <div class="skills-group">
    <div class="skills-group-label">Programming</div>
    <div class="skills-chips">
      <span class="skill-chip">R</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">RShiny</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Python</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">HTML</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">CSS</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">JavaScript</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skills-group">
    <div class="skills-group-label">Statistical Methods</div>
    <div class="skills-chips">
      <span class="skill-chip">Causal inference</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Bayesian inference</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Spatio-temporal modelling</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Hierarchical modelling</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Hidden Markov models</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Non-linear modelling</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Simulation-based inference</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Study design</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skills-group">
    <div class="skills-group-label">Ecological Modelling</div>
    <div class="skills-chips">
      <span class="skill-chip">Population dynamics</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Occupancy modelling</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Mark-recapture</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Integrated population models</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skills-group">
    <div class="skills-group-label">Text Analysis</div>
    <div class="skills-chips">
      <span class="skill-chip">Structural topic models</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Natural language processing</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skills-group">
    <div class="skills-group-label">Data Visualisation</div>
    <div class="skills-chips">
      <span class="skill-chip">ggplot2</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">gganimate</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">plotly</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">leaflet</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skills-group">
    <div class="skills-group-label">Data Wrangling</div>
    <div class="skills-chips">
      <span class="skill-chip">tidyverse</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">base R</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">SQL (SQLite via R)</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skills-group">
    <div class="skills-group-label">Teaching &amp; Communication</div>
    <div class="skills-chips">
      <span class="skill-chip">In-person &amp; online delivery</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Course coordination (~150 students)</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Accessible teaching of complex methods</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Postgraduate &amp; PhD supervision</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skills-group">
    <div class="skills-group-label">Scientific Communication</div>
    <div class="skills-chips">
      <span class="skill-chip">Peer-reviewed publications</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Textbook authorship</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Grant writing</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skills-group">
    <div class="skills-group-label">Reproducible Research</div>
    <div class="skills-chips">
      <span class="skill-chip">RMarkdown</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Quarto</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">LaTeX</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Git</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">GitHub Pages</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Simulation workflows</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skills-group">
    <div class="skills-group-label">Languages</div>
    <div class="skills-chips">
      <span class="skill-chip">English (Fluent)</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Afrikaans (Fluent)</span>
      <span class="skill-chip">Spanish (Basic)</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

[$\leftarrow$ Back to CV Overview](cv.qmd)
